title: tragacantha leucomalla
intro: Tragacantha leucomalla, also known as Astragalus leucomalus, is a plant species in the pea family, Fabaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing stress, improving immune function, and protecting against infections. Tragacantha leucomalla can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or capsule, and is often used in herbal remedies to support overall well-being.
